description: Style Noteadrika captures the mood of the moment with this statement piece designed to snazz up any outfit. Keep the rest of your accessories minimal for maximum impact and style this with a monochrome top. Product DetailsBlue beaded 20 strand necklace with the first strand being the shortest and the last, the longestMulticoloured beads on either ends of both strandsStrands culminate in a lobster claspMaterial and CareGlass and Poth glass beadsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of shortest strand: 41 cmLength of longest strand: 69 cm
